title: erysimum griffithianum
intro: Erysimum griffithianum, also known as Griffith's wallflower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, and has been used to treat conditions such as arthritis and digestive issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
